title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 173.258 - Director to deposit funds in kids' chance scholarship fund, when
text:
173.258.  Director to deposit funds in kids' chance scholarship fund, when. — The director of the division of workers' compensation shall deposit fifty thousand dollars from the premium tax collected pursuant to section 287.690 on the second Monday in October of each year beginning in 1999 until 2018 into the kids' chance scholarship fund.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1237, et al. § 2, A.L. 2008 H.B. 2191)
